The stars of Jupiter are Punarvasu, Visaka and Poorvapathra. There

Nodes are stronger than the planets. Hence find out whether
Rahu or ICethu occupies their houses or conjoin with them or receive
aspects from either Moon or J uplter. Then, they also will be the
slgnificators.
Ketu is in Cancer in Moon's sign. So Ketu is stronger than Moon.
Rahu receives the beneficial 5th aspect from Jupiter. Hence Rahu
acquires the strength of Jupiter, other than what it has to offer, as an
agent of Saturn, by occupying Capricorn owned by Saturn and also by
receiving aspect (3rd) from Saturn.
